figures.caption: Table 2: High-compression sweep. The lora r48 row is a rank-48 LoRA trained under the same protocol; its parameter count and loss are independent of the sparse-coefficient K, so at these compressions it holds ≥ 4× the trainable budget of the spectral cells and is included as a fixed reference line only.
Table 1: Character-level language modelling on tinyshakespeare at K = mn/2. Validation loss is the mean cross-entropy over 50 held-out batches at the final epoch.
